title: Apple readies massive Siri overhaul for iOS 27: 5 major AI upgrades to expect at WWDC 2026
snippet: After numerous delays Apple could finally be bringing the latest version of Siri with iOS 27. The Cupertino based tech giant is expected to bring features like personalized responses by tapping into user data, third-party AI chatbot integration, a dedicated Siri app and more with iOS 27.

title: OnePlus Nord 6 India launch roundup: Launch date, expected price and specifications
snippet: OnePlus Nord 6 will debut in India on 7 April with the Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, a 165Hz AMOLED display, 9,000mAh battery and a dedicated Wi-Fi chip. The phone is expected to be priced in the  ₹35,000 - 40,000 price bracket.

title: India can build serious AI with less capital than frontier labs: Peak XV’s Ravishankar
snippet: G.V. Ravishankar of Peak XV Capital highlights India's potential in the AI sector, emphasizing that innovation doesn't always require massive spending. Indian startups can thrive by quickly adopting AI for practical applications in everyday use cases.

title: Meta readies two prescription-supported Ray-Ban AI glasses, set to launch next week: Report
snippet: Meta plans to launch two new Ray-Ban smart glasses next week for prescription wearers The glasses will be available in rectangular and rounded styles, sold through traditional eyewear channels

title: Microsoft reportedly developing a cheaper Xbox Game Pass tier for first-party studio titles: here's what to expect
snippet: A leak suggests Microsoft is creating a budget Xbox Game Pass tier named 'Triton', focusing on first-party games like Fallout 4 and Gears 5. The move comes amidst rumours that Xbox CEO Asha Sharma wants to make Game pass more affordable

title: Indonesia starts implementing social media restrictions for children under 16
snippet: Indonesia starts implementing social media restrictions for children under 16

title: Netflix raises US prices once more — what does this mean for viewers?
snippet: Netflix has increased subscription prices in the United States for the second time in under two years, raising costs across all plans. The move reflects broader industry pressures and a push to boost revenue amid slowing subscriber growth.

title: Sony to raise PlayStation 5 price to offset soaring memory chip costs. Here's how much it will cost now
snippet: Effective 2 April, the new US pricing will set the standard Sony PlayStation 5 at $649.99, up from $549.99.

title: Sharp launches India's first window AC with active air purification: Check price, specs, and features
snippet: Sharp has launched the Ryohu-FS fixed-speed window ACs with capacities from 1.41 to 1.70 tons. The new window AC lineup comes with a 5-year warranty with prices starting at  ₹34,490 in India.

title: Google employees are flocking to ‘Agent Smith’ AI tool to automate coding tasks from their phones: Report
snippet: Google employees are using a new AI tool named Agent Smith which automates tasks like coding. The popularity of the new tool has led Google to restrict has led to restricted access by the company .

title: Zetwork's pre-IPO move; War hits your deliveries
snippet: Happy Monday! Zetwerk is in talks to raise pre-IPO funding. This and more in today's ETtech Morning Dispatch.

snippet: Global companies are diversifying supply chains, benefiting India, Vineet Sekhsaria, India head at Prologis, told ET. title: Indian startups turn to small languages models to solve for efficiency, privacy, cost
snippet: Indian startups are shifting to smaller AI models. This move addresses high cloud costs, patchy internet, and new data privacy laws. These compact models offer better sector-specific performance and data protection. Companies in fintech, healthtech, and legaltech are benefiting. This strategy ensure

title: B2B firm Zetwerk eyes Rs 500 crore pre-IPO round at $3 billion valuation
snippet: Manufacturing marketplace Zetwerk is in discussions to raise approximately Rs 500 crore in pre-IPO funding from Bharat Value Fund and HNIs, valuing the company at Rs 25,000-26,000 crore. The company is also preparing to confidentially file draft IPO papers with Sebi for a public issue expected to be

title: War singes ecommerce, quick commerce supply chains as input costs rise
snippet: The first signs of stress, according to industry executives, are visible in packaging costs and inventory movement and fulfilment cycles, particularly for quick comm platforms that depend on high-frequency restocking. Demand-side pressures could emerge if fuel prices rise sharply, they said.

title: WTO talks in Brazil-US deadlock over ecommerce duties moratorium
snippet: Negotiations to extend the moratorium - ​which is set to expire in March - by four years plus an additional buffer year to 2031 are stuck, even though a broader reform package appears close to a deal, a senior diplomat and two diplomats told Reuters.

title: WTO MC: Members intensify talks on ecommerce duty moratorium extension at Yaounde
snippet: While some countries oppose an extension or favour a two-year period, the US is pushing for a longer duration.

title: Sarvam AI's new vertical 'Chanakya' to address problems of 'national consequence'
snippet: In a post on X, the company said it has spent the past year quietly building full-stack AI for `problems of national consequence and complex enterprises,' and is now expanding the effort into a dedicated vertical.

title: Meta to launch new AI glasses aimed at prescription wearers
snippet: While the company’s glasses — sold in tandem with EssilorLuxottica SA — have long supported prescription lenses, this will mark the first time the companies are introducing Ray-Bans designed specifically for that cohort, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
